protocol_definition: For each node, derive the fixed sequence with respect to its prefix of length k, canonicalize the exact return substitution, and iterate to closure from the seven B535 seed systems.

S_A.completeness_argument: The primitive prolongable return substitution has a fixed point y. The coding Theta satisfies source(Theta(i))=Theta(target(i)) exactly, so Theta(y) is the unique source fixed point beginning in 0. Proper return-word boundaries then imply the return-word list is complete.
